title: Incoming Webhooks on Monday

posts.author: beverlyRoadGoose (Tobi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I recently launched an app on the marketplace that enables incoming webhooks.

Basically, you can set up webhooks that create, update, or delete items on your boards, directly from monday. This can be useful as a lightweight alternative for use cases where Zapier or make might be overkill.

If you give it a try I’d love to hear how it works for you, if you run into any bugs and also feature requests!

You can find it on the marketplace and https://hookpanda.io
